out-of-scope.reason: Scripted painting modifications — runtime DOM mutation post-paint

pending-substrate.reason: SMIL animations. The DOM settler pins the SVG timeline at t=0 via SVGSVGElement.pauseAnimations() + setCurrentTime(0) so the settled DOM reflects the initial-frame state, matching how a browser would render a static screenshot taken at SVG construction. Reftests that compare against an animated end-state are out of our static-renderer model (same trade-off the CSS-animation t=0 lock documents).
SVG <filter> primitives — needs phpdftk/raster
<textPath> — needs path-following text shaping
per-<tspan> font overrides — needs cascade inheritance
CSS Inline Layout 3 `inline-size` property on SVG text — needs Inline Layout inside SVG (separate from html-to-pdf's inline layout)
Multi-line SVG <text> with per-tspan x/y stacking — needs the per-tspan line-position cascade
CSS shape-inside on SVG text — needs shape-following text layout (related to text-on-path)
SVG text bidi controls + anchor character handling — needs SVG-specific bidi resolution distinct from html-to-pdf's
CSS dominant-baseline property on SVG text — needs per-baseline anchor selection from font OS/2 / hhea metrics
<image> http(s) hrefs — needs resource loader
<image> external file hrefs — needs resource loader for fetched files
<use> external references — needs resource loader
<use> external SVG / HTML resource resolution — needs resource loader + cross-document reference handling
<use> data: URL references — needs base64 / data-URL pre-resolution before <use> resolution
Same family as use-data-url — fragment references inside a data: URL <use> target
<use> referencing <foreignObject> — needs the foreignObject substrate plus <use> instantiation
<use> referencing fragments outside the SVG namespace — needs cross-namespace reference resolution
currentScale property mutation triggers repaint — SVGSVGElement runtime DOM mutation outside our static substrate

<foreignObject> + transformed descendant paint-order — needs the foreignObject substrate
<foreignObject> intrinsic-size resolution — needs the foreignObject substrate
<foreignObject> + CSS margin collapsing on the descendant block — needs the foreignObject substrate
Nested SVG inside <foreignObject> inside <object> — needs the foreignObject substrate
SVG <marker> element + marker-start / marker-mid / marker-end properties — `Translator.php` flags this as a future deliverable; not implemented yet
Marker on implicit subpaths created by Z+M — same substrate as svg/painting/marker-*
Marker + filter combination — needs marker substrate plus the existing filter substrate gap
CSS `vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke` — needs stroke width to be normalised against the current transform
Percentage values on SVG stroke-width / stroke-dasharray / stroke-dashoffset — needs SVG 2 §7.10 percentage-against-viewport-actual-length resolution at paint time
Paint context inheritance for currentColor / context-fill / context-stroke through <use> and <marker> — needs paint-context plumbing
CSS `paint-order` property — needs paint-order respect during fill/stroke/markers emission
currentColor repaint on dynamic color change — runtime DOM mutation outside static substrate
Same as currentcolor-fill-stroke-repaint with color-mix() — runtime DOM mutation
clip-path on text with transform — needs clip-path on text-flow content
mask on text with transform — needs mask + text path interaction
Sub-pixel clip-path transforms — needs sub-pixel coordinate handling in clip-path
<symbol> inside <mask> — needs the mask substrate respecting <symbol> content
display:none on <mask> children — needs mask substrate respecting display
Nested SVG with small viewBox — needs viewBox + percentage geometry interaction
CSS will-change layer + <mask> — needs mask substrate
CSS mix-blend-mode on SVG content — needs PDF blend-mode emission via ExtGState

Same as overflow-clip on nested <svg> — needs nested-viewport overflow clipping
Media-fragment spatial URL (#xywh=) on SVG resources — needs the media-fragment URL parser + viewport derivation
Media-fragment cascade precedence — same substrate as media-fragment-spatial-*

Same family as view-viewbox-override — svgview() URL fragment

<a> href attribute mutation triggers repaint — runtime DOM mutation
SVG path 'bearing' command (B/b) — removed from SVG 2 final spec; not in current path-data grammar

Same family as viewBox-*-change-* — explicit viewBox-change-repaint name pattern

<view> + transform + viewBox interaction — needs <view> substrate
